source: PseudoForge reviewed ntoskrnl 10.0.26200.8457 ETW/WMI provider, write, trace-control, callback, notification, and IRP role-only identity pack; no private field offsets.

profiles.source: Reviewed EtwRegister public provider registration wrapper into EtwpRegisterKMProvider.

parameters.source: EtwRegister current server silo ETW state local

profiles.source: Reviewed EtwRegisterClassicProvider classic provider wrapper and callback/context forwarding.
Reviewed EtwUnregister registration handle validation, list unlink, event write, and provider cleanup.

parameters.source: EtwUnregister event data descriptor used for unregister tracing

profiles.source: Reviewed EtwEventEnabled provider handle, event descriptor, and level/keyword gate.
Reviewed EtwProviderEnabled provider handle, level, and keyword mask gate.
Reviewed EtwWriteEx enabled-provider gates and EtwpEventWriteFull handoff.

parameters.source: EtwWriteEx filter argument renamed from Filter

profiles.source: Reviewed WmiTraceMessage varargs wrapper into EtwpTraceMessageVa.

parameters.source: WmiTraceMessage varargs list forwarded to EtwpTraceMessageVa

profiles.source: Reviewed EtwpTraceMessageVa trace-message formatting, provider gates, buffer reserve, send, and callback dispatch flow.
Reviewed EtwpLogContextSwapEvent context-switch trace packing where the previous and next thread arguments feed EtwpCCSwapTrace and KTHREAD-based stack/LBR dispatch.

parameters.source: EtwpLogContextSwapEvent previous thread argument used for context-switch event fields
EtwpLogContextSwapEvent next thread argument forwarded to stack, context-register, and last-branch trace dispatchers

profiles.source: Reviewed EtwTraceContAllocationEvent ntoskrnl 26200.8457 KERNEL_MEM_EVENT_CONT_ALLOCATION payload construction and EtwWriteEx call; preview-only weak private prototype.
Reviewed DbgkWerCaptureLiveKernelDump ntoskrnl 26200.8457 wrapper that builds a live-kernel-dump option block and forwards to DbgkWerCaptureLiveKernelDump2; preview-only weak private prototype.
Reviewed NtTraceEvent user/system trace dispatch, logger handle/object reference, trace message, and logger open flow.
Reviewed NtTraceControl control-code switch over start/stop/query/update/flush/logger-info paths.
Reviewed EtwRegisterEventCallback logger lookup, callback block allocation, and callback context install.
Reviewed EtwEnableTrace wrapper into EtwpEnableTrace with provider GUID, level, flags, and callback context inputs.
Reviewed EtwSetInformation provider traits, descriptor mode, and provider-binary tracking controls.

parameters.source: EtwSetInformation optional provider-binary tracking information local

WmipRegisterEtwProvider allocated legacy ETW work item

Reviewed WmipProcessLegacyEtwUnregister mutex-protected registration handle clear and EtwUnregister handoff.

WmipReceiveNotifications referenced WMI GUID object local
WmipReceiveNotifications queued spin lock handle local
